zh.lifeSummary: 當Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa於0978年出生在瑞士吉艾福吉艾福時，他的父親Olderico Manfredi I di Torino30歲，母親Prangarda di Canossa23歲。他和Berta di Milano至少有3個女兒。他去世於1034年10月29日在義大利皮蒙特托利諾托利諾享年56歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特托利諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa于0978年出生在瑞士吉艾福吉艾福时，他的父亲Olderico Manfredi I di Torino30岁，母亲Prangarda di Canossa23岁。他和Berta di Milano至少有3个女儿。他去世于1034年10月29日在意大利皮蒙特托利諾托利諾享年56岁，埋葬在意大利皮蒙特托利諾。

nameMeanings.name: Manfredi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, borne by a 13th-century king of Sicily. See Manfred .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa was born in 0978, in Geneva, Geneva, Switzerland, his father, Olderico Manfredi I di Torino, was 30 and his mother, Prangarda di Canossa, was 23. He had at least 3 daughters with Berta di Milano. He died on 29 October 1034, in Turin, Turin, Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 56, and was buried in Turin, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa est né en 0978, à Genève, Genève, Suisse, son père, Olderico Manfredi I di Torino, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Prangarda di Canossa, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Berta di Milano. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1034, à Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Torino, Piemonte, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa 0978 in Genf, Genf, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Olderico Manfredi I di Torino 30 und seine Mutter Prangarda di Canossa 23. Er hatte mit Berta di Milano mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Oktober 1034 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Turin, Torino, Piemonte, Italien und wurde in Torino, Piemonte, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa è nato il nel 0978 nel Ginevra, Ginevra, Svizzera, il suo padre, Olderico Manfredi I di Torino, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Prangarda di Canossa, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Berta di Milano. Morì il 29 ottobre 1034, nel Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Torino, Piemonte, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susaが0978年にスイスジェンeブジェンeブで生まれた時，父Olderico Manfredi I di Torinoは30歳，母Prangarda di Canossaは23歳であった。彼はBerta di Milanoとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1034年10月29日にイタリアピエモントトリノトリノで56歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントトリノにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa(이)가 0978년 스위스 e브 e브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Olderico Manfredi I di Torino(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Prangarda di Canossa(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Berta di Milano(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1034년 10월 29일 이탈리아 피몽 토리노 토리노에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽 토리노에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa nasceu em 0978, em Genève, Genève, Suiça, seu pai, Olderico Manfredi I di Torino, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Prangarda di Canossa, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Berta di Milano. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1034, em Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Itália, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Torino, Piemonte, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa родился в 0978 г. в местности дженeв, дженeв, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Olderico Manfredi I di Torino было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Prangarda di Canossa, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Berta di Milano. Он умер 29 октября 1034 г. в местности торино, торино, пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности торино, пиемонт, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olderico Manfredi II marchese di Torino e Susa nació en 0978, en Genève, Genève, Suiza, su papá, Olderico Manfredi I di Torino, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Prangarda di Canossa, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Berta di Milano. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1034, en Torino, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Torino, Piemonte, Italia.
